title: Possibilities and theories for NTE
wikitext:
[]: Possibilities and theories for NTE             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jan 30, 2021 9:37 pm Sharpe wrote: If Shinji in his old plugsuit is simply just because they have one lying around or they make one for him, I’ll be somewhat disappointed, it would be cool if he got a new one (and you’d think khara would want to opt to give him a new one for merchandising). Unit 01 looks beautiful.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Sat Jan 30, 2021 10:09 pm I'd say putting Shinji in the 01 plugsuit is a bigger spoiler by itself, and if Khara wanted to hide something like they did with Mari, they would have just kept him in the 13 plugsuit.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Sun Jan 31, 2021 1:14 am Would it be considered a "spoiler" if it's something the marketing team think safe to show in promo footages? Shinji wearing the old plugsuit is one hell of a tease but it's more of a large breadcrumb than anything else, for now we do know he will wear it and pilot Unit-01 at some point in the film, but how does it get to that point is still a total mystery.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sun Jan 31, 2021 3:32 am I still wouldn't bet in Instrumentality. Not after 2 "near impacts"

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Sun Jan 31, 2021 7:27 am I'd say putting Shinji in the 01 plugsuit is a bigger spoiler by itself

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jan 31, 2021 12:58 pm FXArmaros98 wrote: However, the spoilers that I feel they should have avoided giving us personally I believe are Gendo with the damaged visor and the battle between Evangelion Unit 01 and Evangelion 13.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Sun Jan 31, 2021 1:30 pm kuribo-04 yes, I too am quite suspicious of the images of the presumed Nerv and Tokyo III restored. But I really think Shinji is the pilot of Evangelion Unit 01, because I believe that instead of Gendo and Fuyutsuki to control Evangelion 13 could be Kaworu's soul. Because the pose of Evangelion 13 in the trailer not only is it apparently quite similar with which Kaworu appears in Ep 24 but if you notice well in both scenes there seems to be the sunset in both scenes. Maybe Kaworu wants to look like the real villain to defeat in order to try to redeem Shinji in the eyes of the world. Maybe none of the scenes featuring him in his old plug suit are happening in the literal Eva world

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jan 31, 2021 2:17 pm FXArmaros98 wrote: kuribo-04 yes, I too am quite suspicious of the images of the presumed Nerv and Tokyo III restored. But I really think Shinji is the pilot of Evangelion Unit 01

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Sun Jan 31, 2021 2:52 pm But I think some things might be different than we expect and there's gonna be surprises.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Feb 02, 2021 4:22 pm Heaven Piercing Man wrote: I'd say putting Shinji in the 01 plugsuit is a bigger spoiler by itself, and if Khara wanted to hide something like they did with Mari, they would have just kept him in the 13 plugsuit.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Tue Feb 02, 2021 5:47 pm Ray wrote: Because the Shinji with the serious expression and the glowing purple eyes, isn't Shinji.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Feb 02, 2021 5:59 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: Why not? He had both of those in ha's climax (Save for the eyes being orange)

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Feb 02, 2021 6:49 pm Ray wrote: Also purple in terms of color theory is often a sign of contamination or corruption or demonic possession in Japanese pop culture.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by EscapismIsBad » Tue Feb 02, 2021 6:49 pm Ray wrote: Arcadia's legacy#909277 wrote: Why not? He had both of those in ha's climax (Save for the eyes being orange)

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Tue Feb 02, 2021 7:06 pm Ray wrote: Heaven Piercing Man#908985 wrote: I'd say putting Shinji in the 01 plugsuit is a bigger spoiler by itself, and if Khara wanted to hide something like they did with Mari, they would have just kept him in the 13 plugsuit.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Feb 02, 2021 10:30 pm Heaven Piercing Man wrote: Huh? What does the timeskip have to do with this? Shinji was in his school uniform when 2.0 ended.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Huagh » Tue Feb 02, 2021 11:37 pm But the Shinji that is wearing the white plugsuit, and the one with purple eyes is heavily implied to be piloting EVA-01, and that would be impossible during the time skip as EVA-01 is out in space.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Feb 02, 2021 11:45 pm It's likely it wasn't in space for the entire 14 years.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Wed Feb 03, 2021 7:46 am I personally think the whole "imposter Angel Shinji gets confused for the real Shinji" theory that GoatJesus created doesn't really hold up, for one main reason: the presence of Unit 13. That unit was the latest one yet in the time of 3.0, and its construction was just completed before the climax of the movie. The GoatJesus theory seems to be suggesting that the fight with Unit 13 takes place just a few months after 2.0, which creates a contradiction. That's why I think that the fight with Unit 13 has to be taking place in the "present day" of the final movie, and that Shinji will pilot again.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by kboyrulez12345 » Wed Feb 03, 2021 10:13 am BusterMachine4 wrote: I personally think the whole "imposter Angel Shinji gets confused for the real Shinji" theory that GoatJesus created doesn't really hold up, for one main reason: the presence of Unit 13. That unit was the latest one yet in the time of 3.0, and its construction was just completed before the climax of the movie. The GoatJesus theory seems to be suggesting that the fight with Unit 13 takes place just a few months after 2.0, which creates a contradiction. That's why I think that the fight with Unit 13 has to be taking place in the "present day" of the final movie, and that Shinji will pilot again.

That unit was the latest one yet in the time of 3.0, and its construction was just completed before the climax of the movie. The GoatJesus theory seems to be suggesting that the fight with Unit 13 takes place just a few months after 2.0, which creates a contradiction. That's why I think that the fight with Unit 13 has to be taking place in the "present day" of the final movie, and that Shinji will pilot again.
